Cultural.rationale: Pro-European cultural identity; emphasis on openness, diversity, and internationalism. To be documented.

Military.rationale: Support for EU defence cooperation and multilateralism; generally less hawkish. To be documented.

Sovereignty.rationale: Advocacy for shared sovereignty and supranational governance via EU membership. To be documented.

Economic.rationale: Strong preference for retaining EU single-market membership and free movement. To be documented.

Class.rationale: Cross-class coalition; emphasis on protecting workers' rights via EU regulatory frameworks. To be documented.

Governance.rationale: Emphasis on democratic participation, civil liberties, and rule of law at supranational level. To be documented.
